# Gdn Guardiankey

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî GDN GuardianKey tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `gdn_guardiankey` | Query GuardianKey GDN analytics API for authentication events and risk-scoring data | `gdn:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "gdn_org_id": "",
  "url": ""
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | ‚Äî | GDN API key sent in the X-API-Key header. Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__API_KEY env var. |
| `gdn_org_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Organisation ID in the GDN platform (hex string). Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__GDN_ORG_ID env var. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | GDN API base URL. The /api/v1 suffix is appended automatically if absent. Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__URL env var. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | GDN API key sent in the X-API-Key header. Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__API_KEY env var. |
| `TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__GDN_ORG_ID` | `gdn_org_id` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Organisation ID in the GDN platform (hex string). Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__GDN_ORG_ID env var. |
| `TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | GDN API base URL. The /api/v1 suffix is appended automatically if absent. Overrides TOOL_GDN_GUARDIANKEY__URL env var. |
